mechanism_narrative: A stronger 3-month trend in nominal retail sales signals improving household demand and near-term revenue momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS October 2012 vintage was 411591 million dollars
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day forward S&P 500 returns than lower-growth observations in walk-forward tests, or Rank IC is below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, causing equity investors to mark down earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE 3-month change crosses above +0.3 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases and mean triggered returns are not below the unconditional mean at p <= 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer inflation accelerates while the federal funds rate is pinned near zero, real policy rates fall but inflation-risk and margin-pressure premia rise, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS < 0.5 percent and CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized inflation crosses above 3 percent
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger does not underperform periods with low FEDFUNDS and non-accelerating CPIAUCSL, or if the interaction term has the wrong sign in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in industrial production signals falling factory output and weaker operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month log change crosses below -1 percent
failure_condition: Reject if triggered INDPRO contractions are followed by nonnegative 60-day S&P 500 returns at a frequency above the unconditional positive-return rate, or if average excess returns are not negative.

mechanism_narrative: A housing-starts upswing combined with falling unemployment signals a self-reinforcing household balance-sheet recovery, raising expected consumption and construction earnings over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST 3-month growth crosses above +5 percent while UNRATE 3-month change is below 0 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST September 2012 vintage was 872 thousand units
failure_condition: Reject if the joint housing-labor trigger fails to outperform either HOUST growth alone or UNRATE decline alone over 60 trading days in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A more negative 3-month change in the federal funds rate signals easier liquidity and lower discount rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if falling FEDFUNDS changes are not associated with higher 5-day forward S&P 500 returns than rising FEDFUNDS changes, or if the sign is unstable across rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll gains while unemployment remains elevated signal a recovery phase with rising income but limited wage-pressure and policy-tightening risk, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE > 7.5 percent and PAYEMS 3-month average monthly gain crosses above +150 thousand
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS October 2012 vintage was 133755 thousand persons
failure_condition: Reject if high-unemployment strong-payroll observations do not have higher 20-day forward returns than high-unemployment weak-payroll observations, or if interaction alpha is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly real GDP growth slowdown below stall speed signals broad demand weakness and declining earnings revisions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth crosses below +1 percent
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 July 2012 vintage was 13616.2 billions of chained 2017 dollars
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 stall-speed triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns more often than the unconditional sample rate or if average triggered returns are not below zero.
